path.id: illuminated lines and halos represent how a memory feels: personal and specific, shared with others, collective and cultural, or mixed/unsure
each orb represents a memory that someone feels nostalgic about
colors of orbs correspond to the emotional experience of remembering
textures of orbs correspond to information about the memory
orbs are plotted above the basemap, which is formed by the place types in which the memories take place

g.id: zoom out to see patterns across cohorts zoom in or click to explore the memories filter to see other dimensions of data toggle to change view
